title: ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
org: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR)
shortInfo: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Project Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of ICMR NITVAR. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Project Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of ICMR NITVAR. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health with five years’ post qualification experience or PhD + two years post qualification experience, Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health with three years post-qualification experience or PhD, MBBS with three years’ post qualification experience OR MBBS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MPH) or equivalent OR MBBS with PhD
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist III (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health including the integrated PG degrees, with five years’ post qualification experience or PhD + two years post qualification experience. Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) / Data Manager: Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health including the integrated PG degrees, with three years post-qualification experience or PhD. Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS with three years’ post qualification experience OR MBBS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MPH) or any equivalent degree, including integrated PG degrees OR MBBS with PhD.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) / Data Manager

selection_process: Walk-In-Interview Written test if number of eligible candidates more than 30 for each position

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NITVAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research Scientist posts at ICMR NITVAR is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Research Scientist positions at ICMR NITVAR. These are distributed across different specializations as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary for each post. Generally, it includes a Post Graduate Degree in Health Science or related fields with specified years of experience, or a PhD. For the medical post, an MBBS degree with experience or further specialization is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Research Scientist posts is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the guidelines of ICMR.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 67,000 to Rs. 80,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Walk-In-Interview. However, a written test may be conducted if more than 30 eligible candidates apply for a particular position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411026.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need to apply online before attending the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is for a Walk-in Interview. You do not need to apply online beforehand. You should directly report to the venue on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NITVAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research Scientist posts at ICMR NITVAR is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.
